puzzle.title: The Reluctant Messenger
puzzle.intro: Destiny calls upon a soul living in self-imposed exile. Fleeing a past transgression, this individual is chosen for a monumental task: to confront the most powerful tyrant of the age. With divine signs and a trusted companion, this messenger must return to the land of their youth to deliver a message of liberation and monotheism. Can you uncover the identity of this reluctant hero?
clues: I was raised in the heart of my enemy's household, yet I never knew them as my own.
In a moment of anger, I struck a person and unintentionally caused their death, forcing me to flee my home.
While traveling with my family, I saw a fire on a distant mountain and approached it, seeking warmth and guidance.
At that mountain, I spoke directly with my Lord, who commanded me to go to a tyrant and ask him to free my people.
My Lord granted me two great signs: my staff, which could turn into a serpent, and my hand, which would shine with a brilliant white light.
I asked my Lord to appoint my brother, Harun, as a helper for me, as he was more eloquent in speech.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Prophet Yusuf
Prophet Ibrahim
Prophet Musa
Prophet Muhammad (ﷺ)
Dhul-Qarnayn

trial.label: What was my primary mission?
options: Building a great ark to survive a flood
Interpreting the dreams of a king in Egypt
Leading an army against the giant Jalut
Confronting Fir'awn and freeing the Israelites
Rebuilding the Kaaba with my son
trial.answer: Confronting Fir'awn and freeing the Israelites

location.label: What object was a key sign for me?
options: A coat of many colors that caused jealousy
A staff that turned into a serpent
A ship built on dry land
A ring that controlled the wind and Jinn
A clay bird that came to life
location.answer: A staff that turned into a serpent

outcome.label: What was a major event following the confrontation?
options: Parting the Red Sea to escape
Being thrown into a fire which became cool and safe
Being swallowed by a giant fish and repenting
Being raised to the heavens without dying
Being given a kingdom that no one after me would have
outcome.answer: Parting the Red Sea to escape

puzzle.arabic: ٱسْلُكْ يَدَكَ فِى جَيْبِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَآءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوٓءٍۢ وَٱضْمُمْ إِلَيْكَ جَنَاحَكَ مِنَ ٱلرَّهْبِ ۖ فَذَٰنِكَ بُرْهَـٰنَانِ مِن رَّبِّكَ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَإِي۟هِۦٓ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًۭا فَـٰسِقِينَ
puzzle.verse: Insert your hand into the opening of your garment; it will come out white, without disease. And draw in your arm close to you [as prevention] from fear, for those are two proofs from your Lord to Pharaoh and his establishment. Indeed, they have been a people defiantly disobedient." (28:32)
